emails.subject: FW: Book2.xls
emails.body: Kam, I need to spend about 30 mins with you on the automation process and that you agree with the way we are generating the risktrac book-id. Please let me know a convinient time to meet you. Regards, Ramesh

emails.subject: RE: Book2.xls
emails.body: How about tomorrow morning at 9:30? I have a meeting at 10:00 and I'm clear around that. KK

emails.subject: RE: Book2.xls
emails.body: RE: Book2.xls Will do. Please send me your location in ecn. Thanks, Ramesh From:gramesh@skytel.com

emails.subject: RE: Book2.xls
emails.body: Only inactivate those books that don't have a trader name next to it on the book request. There are only a about 6 that should be inactivated. KK To: Keiser, Kam

emails.subject: RE: Book2.xls
emails.body: RE: Book2.xls I will explain tomorrow. I understand your concern. Regards, Ramesh From:gramesh@skytel.com

emails.subject: RE: Book2.xls
emails.body: I am on the 5th floor. 05156. See you then. To: Keiser, Kam

emails.subject: FW: Book2.xls
emails.body: FW: Book2.xls Kam, I understand that you have a meeting with Debbie regarding portfolios/books et al. Let me see what are the results of that meeting and we can then decide to meet about this. Regards, Ramesh To: Ramesh, Ganapathy
